title: Milkdown image resolver plugin with dynamic source resolution
purpose: Resolves image sources dynamically based on project and session context, and renders images with proper attributes and styling in a Milkdown editor.
module_context: Exports a default function that creates a Milkdown view plugin for handling image nodes, along with a React component that resolves image sources and renders the image with appropriate attributes.

steps.content: Access the node attributes from the context provided by the editor.
Retrieve the project and session data from the context.
Extract the source, alt text, and title from the node attributes.
Attempt to resolve the image source using the project and session data.
IF source resolution fails, fall back to the original source.
Render an image element with the resolved source and extracted attributes.
Accept a node view factory function as input.
Return a Milkdown view configuration for the image schema node.
Use the provided factory to create a component view for the ImageResolverView.
